popularStory.headline: BIO
popularStory.description:
BIO:  from http://fmg.ac/Projects/MedLands/ENGLISHNOBILITYMEDIEVAL3.htm#AliceCorbetMRobertStafford as of 4/5/2016

ROBERT Corbet (-[22 Jul 1219/17 Oct 1222]).  Eyton quotes (in translation) a charter …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Robert Corbet於1158年之前出生在英國史洛普爾朋特斯波利時，他的父親Simon Corbet41歲，母親Margaret de Brampton42歲。他於1182年與Emma de Pantulf在英國英格蘭史洛普爾維姆結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和7個女兒的父母。他去世於1222年10月17日之前在英國史洛普爾，埋葬在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾阿爾斯特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Robert Corbet于1158年之前出生在英国史洛普爾朋特斯波利时，他的父亲Simon Corbet41岁，母亲Margaret de Brampton42岁。他于1182年与Emma de Pantulf在英国英格兰史洛普爾維姆结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和7个女儿的父母。他去世于1222年10月17日之前在英国史洛普爾，埋葬在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾阿爾斯特。

nameMeanings.name: Corbet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: History: Walter Corbet, a royal knight in 12th-century Scotland, was the first of that name in that kingdom. His 13th-century descendants were major landholders in the Borders, and in the 14th century they acquired lands in the North of Scotland.

variants.name: Corbett
meanings: English (West Midlands, of Norman origin): nickname from Old French corbet ‘raven’, probably denoting someone with dark hair or a dark complexion.

History: This is the name of a family descended from Hugh Corbet, a Norman baron who settled in Shropshire following the Norman Conquest. One of his descendants, Sir Richard Corbet, was granted land near Shrewsbury in 1223; since the 13th century, this place has been known as Moreton Corbet. The name was taken from Shropshire to Scotland in the 12th century and to northern Ireland in the 17th century, and thence to North America by at least one group of bearers of the name.

nameMeanings.name: Sir
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Old Norse, originally a byname meaning ‘bride, wife’; in mythology the name of Thor's golden-haired wife.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Robert Corbet was born before 1158, in Pontesbury, Shropshire, England, his father, Simon Corbet, was 41 and his mother, Margaret de Brampton, was 42. He married Emma de Pantulf in 1182, in Wem, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 7 daughters. He died before 17 October 1222, in Shropshire, England, and was buried in Alcester, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Robert Corbet est né avant 1158, à Pontesbury, Shropshire, Angleterre, son père, Simon Corbet, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Margaret de Brampton, avait 42 ans. Il a épousé Emma de Pantulf en 1182, à Wem, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 7 filles. Il est décédé avant 17 octobre 1222, à Shropshire, Angleterre, et a été enterré à Alcester, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Robert Corbet vor 1158 in Pontesbury, Shropshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Simon Corbet 41 und seine Mutter Margaret de Brampton 42. Er hat 1182 in Wem, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom Emma de Pantulf geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Er starb vor 17. Oktober 1222 in Shropshire, England und wurde in Alcester, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert Corbet è nato il prima del 1158 nel Pontesbury, Shropshire, England, il suo padre, Simon Corbet, aveva 41 anni e il suo madre, Margaret de Brampton, aveva 42 anni. Lui sposato Emma de Pantulf nel 1182, nel Wem, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 7 figlie. Morì prima del 17 ottobre 1222, nel Shropshire, England, e fu sepolto a Alcester, Warwickshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Robert Corbetが1158年以前にイギリスシュロプシュアイアポンテスブリーで生まれた時，父Simon Corbetは41歳，母Margaret de Bramptonは42歳であった。1182年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアウエムでEmma de Pantulfと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼は1222年10月17日以前にイギリスシュロプシュアイアで死去し，イギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアアルセスターにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Robert Corbet(이)가 1158년 이전 영국 슈럽실르 폰츠버이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Simon Corbet(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret de Brampton(은)는 42세였다. 그는 1182년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 베에서 Emma de Pantulf(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1222년 10월 17일 이전 영국 슈럽실르에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 알스스터에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert Corbet nasceu antes 1158, em Pontesbury, Shropshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Simon Corbet, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Margaret de Brampton, tinha 42 anos. Ele casou-se com Emma de Pantulf em 1182, em Wem, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 7 filhas. Ele faleceu antes 17 de outubro de 1222, em Shropshire, Inglaterra, e foi sepultado em Alcester, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Robert Corbet родился перед 1158 г. в местности понтесбури, шропшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Simon Corbet было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Margaret de Brampton, 42. Он женился на женщине по имени Emma de Pantulf в 1182 г. в местности вем, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 7 дочерей. Он умер перед 17 октябрь 1222 г. в местности шропшир, Англия и был похоронен в местности алсестир, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Robert Corbet nació antes de 1158, en Pontesbury, Shropshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Simon Corbet, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Margaret de Brampton, tenía 42 años. Se casó con Emma de Pantulf en 1182, en Wem, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió antes de 17 de octubre de 1222, en Shropshire, Inglaterra, y fue sepultado en Alcester, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
